registerPurpose: Track whether agenda items survive into minutes, action registers, report cycles and later meeting records.

disappearanceEvents.title: Flying Fox Management Request
disappearanceEvents.plainEnglish: Bellbrook flying fox management request has been identified as a tracked council-record matter. It is not yet a disappearance finding. It requires comparison across minutes, following agendas, following minutes, action registers and any October 2025 report cycle.

needsComparisonAgainst.question: Did the agenda item survive into confirmed minutes and what wording or resolution was recorded?
Was the matter carried forward, deferred, renamed, omitted or replaced?
Was any follow-up action or reporting pathway recorded?
Did it become an official tracked action and did that action receive closure?
Was the expected report delivered, deferred, renamed, omitted or absorbed into another report?

trackingRules.name: Agenda to confirmed minutes survival
trackingRules.logic: If the item appears in agenda but not in confirmed minutes, flag missing-from-minutes.

trackingRules.name: Resolution closure trail
trackingRules.logic: If minutes record a resolution but later records show no action, report or closure, flag resolution-without-closure.

trackingRules.name: Next meeting continuity
trackingRules.logic: If a matter implies future action, check the next ordinary agenda and minutes for continuity or omission.

trackingRules.name: Outstanding action registration
trackingRules.logic: If a motion creates a task, check whether it enters the outstanding actions register.

trackingRules.name: Report-cycle delivery
trackingRules.logic: If a report was due by a later cycle, check that meeting cycle for delivery, deferral, renaming or omission.

trackingRules.name: Renaming and merge detection
trackingRules.logic: If the same matter appears under different wording, link it as renamed or merged rather than treating it as vanished.
